About the Conference

Diplomacy, Without Borders

Nexora MUN is an independent Model United Nations conference convening delegates from across India — entirely online, entirely in earnest.

We were founded on a simple conviction: that rigorous debate, considered diplomacy, and a genuinely premium delegate experience shouldn't depend on a postcode or a physical hall. Nexora brings the weight of a formal committee floor to any screen, anywhere.

This inaugural edition is being built from the ground up by a small, deliberate secretariat — and every detail, from procedure to presentation, is being held to the same standard.

Conference DatesOct 24–25, 2026
FormatOnline
EditionFirst
CommitteesTBA
RegionAll India
The Format

Built for the Screen, Not Diminished by It

Nexora MUN convenes entirely online, across two days of committee sessions, crisis moments, and closing ceremony.

Every session is chaired to the same procedural rigour delegates would expect from a formal in-person floor — structured speeches, moderated caucusing, and considered resolution drafting, delivered through a considered digital experience rather than a hurried video call.

Committee allocations, background guides, and platform details will follow as the secretariat finalises them.

Founders

The Secretariat

Nexora MUN is founded and led by a small team committed to building this conference from first principles.

01

Yashraj Dhar

Founder

The name, the vision, the standard — all his. As Secretary–General, he built Nexora MUN from a blank page into a conference with its own identity, and answers for every decision that shapes it.

02

Wania Tanveer

Co–Founder

One of the few people trusted with the keys to Nexora from day one. Operates with the instinct and precision of someone who doesn't miss — and doesn't let the team miss either.

03

Shihani Aggarwal

Co–Founder

Holds a founding stake in Nexora and the standards to match. Where others settle for good enough, she rebuilds it until it's right — the reason nothing here feels ordinary.

04

Avni Balodi

Co–Founder

A founding force behind Nexora, carrying the kind of composure under pressure that turns ambitious ideas into a conference that actually ships.
